topic: Firewall vs WAF vs API Gateway

scenes.narration: Bhai, Cloudflare ke SDE-2 round mein Firewall vs WAF vs API Gateway pe ye trick poochhi jati hai. 30 second sun le.
Without understanding Firewall vs WAF vs API Gateway, systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of Firewall vs WAF vs API Gateway like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of Firewall vs WAF vs API Gateway: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of Firewall vs WAF vs API Gateway: fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use Firewall vs WAF vs API Gateway to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: Firewall vs WAF vs API Gateway solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
